title: Benjia 30th Birthday Greeting Cards for Men Women, Born in 1996 UK Bday Card with Envelope, 30 Years Old Funny Birthdays Gift Card for Him Her Birthday Decoration Party Supply, Black Gold 20x25 cm
features: 【Elegant & Fun Design】Celebrate with this Happy 30th Birthday Card, featuring a sleek black and gold theme that perfectly captures the nostalgic vibe of 1996 for a fun and memorable party decoration

【High-Quality Materials】This 30th birthday greeting card measures 20x25 cm, comes with an high quality large envelope and 4 retro vibe stickers, allowing plenty of space inside for guests to write personalized birthday wishes. Made from premium 300gsm paper and color printing single-sided lamination, it ensures durability and elegance

【Historical 1996 Facts】The front of the funny birthday greeting card includes key highlights from 1996, such as prices, music, movies, and popular trends, making it a thoughtful and meaningful vintage born in 1996 birthday theme party gift

【Versatile Use】Not just a greeting card, it also serves as a 30 years old birthday themed party decoration, a photo prop, a poster, adding a nostalgic vibe to 30th birthday celebrations, perfect for family gatherings, friend parties, or office events

【Perfect for Milestone Celebration】Ideal for 30th birthday parties, this 30th birthday gift card is perfect for men, women, dad, mom, husband, wife, uncle, aunt, son, daughter - anyone born in 1996 who appreciates nostalgia and want a unique, themed birthday experience
